title: Shard Titan requires Cosmic primary with Strange Jewel

card.rawText: Summon Requirement: Can only be summoned if your primary creature is Cosmic-type and has "Strange Jewel" equipped. You may sacrifice it to summon this card as your primary creature. If this card leaves the field, it returns to a magic card.

effect.value: Summon Requirement: Can only be summoned if your primary creature is Cosmic-type and has "Strange Jewel" equipped. You may sacrifice it to summon this card as your primary creature. If this card leaves the field, it returns to a magic card.

plan.title: Shard Titan requires Cosmic primary with Strange Jewel
plan.summary: Verify Shard Titan summon requirement only succeeds with a Cosmic primary creature equipped with Strange Jewel.

notes: Read text first: Summon Requirement: Can only be summoned if your primary creature is Cosmic-type and has "Strange Jewel" equipped. You may sacrifice it to summon this card as your primary creature. If this card leaves the field, it returns to a magic card.
Use The Villain as the Cosmic primary and Strange Jewel as the required equip.

steps: Equip Strange Jewel to a Cosmic primary.
Verify the custom summon requirement route.

expectedAssertions.label: Shard Titan entered as primary creature
